description: Enable linear barcode reading in bcWebCam's Barcode Options. By default, only EAN barcodes and QR codes are enabled. The product inventory in Desktop/Barcodes/product_barcodes.csv contains items with Code 128 and Code 39 barcodes that require linear barcode support. Click the barcode icon button (left of the gear icon in the bottom toolbar) to open Barcode Options, check the 'Read Linear Barcodes' checkbox, and click OK to apply.
